knowledge: UNDERSTAND HOW WEALTH IS CREATED I like to think that if I lost all my money and you dropped me on a random street in any English-speaking country, within five or ten years I’d be wealthy again because it’s just a skills...

knowledge: That can be through stock options if you work at a tech company.
